subcodes.first_line: O concourse of the pure ones! The Beauty knoweth not from which of His tribulations He should make mention unto you - whether He should recount what hath befallen Him from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا معشر الاصفیا لم یدر البهاء من ای مصائبه یذکر لکم ا یذکر ما ورد علیه من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life
